tasks.name: Extend training code for new methods and architectures
tasks.description: Add PMP-WD, Hill-function variants to optimizers.py. Add VGG-16-BN and ResNet-50 to models.py. Add ImageNet data loading to data.py. Add non-BN ResNet-20 variant. Add per-layer detailed logging mode for steady-state validation.

tasks.name: Pilot: VGG-16-BN on CIFAR-10 (constant + CWD)
tasks.description: Quick validation that VGG-16-BN trains correctly with our code. Run constant and cwd_hard on CIFAR-10 for 20 epochs, seed 42. Check that training converges and metrics are logged correctly.

pilot.pass_criteria: VGG-16-BN trains without error, loss decreases monotonically over 20 epochs, CSI and AIS are logged

tasks.name: Pilot: PMP-WD on ResNet-20/CIFAR-10
tasks.description: Test the new PMP-WD method (lambda_t ∝ gamma*(1-delta)/||w||) for 20 epochs on CIFAR-10. Verify the schedule produces reasonable lambda_t values (no divergence/collapse) and training converges.

pilot.pass_criteria: PMP-WD lambda_t stays in [1e-6, 1e-2], loss decreases, no NaN/Inf

tasks.name: Pilot: Hill function (n=2, n=4) on ResNet-20/CIFAR-10
tasks.description: Test Hill-function WD variants for 20 epochs. Verify sigmoidal modulation produces reasonable lambda_t trajectories.

pilot.pass_criteria: Hill n=2 and n=4 train without error, lambda_t modulation is non-trivial (std > 0.01*mean)

tasks.name: Pilot: ResNet-20 without BN on CIFAR-10
tasks.description: Verify non-BN ResNet-20 trains stably with lr=0.01. Run constant WD for 20 epochs, check convergence.

pilot.pass_criteria: Non-BN ResNet-20 achieves > 70% train acc in 20 epochs with lr=0.01, no training instability

tasks.name: Pilot: ResNet-50/ImageNet (constant WD, 5 epochs)
tasks.description: Verify ImageNet data loading and ResNet-50 training. Run 5 epochs with constant WD. Check GPU memory, throughput, and basic convergence.

pilot.pass_criteria: ResNet-50 trains on ImageNet without OOM (batch_size=256 on 98GB VRAM), top-1 acc > 10% after 5 epochs, throughput > 500 img/s

tasks.name: VGG-16-BN CIFAR-10: 7 methods × 3 seeds
tasks.description: Full VGG-16-BN runs on CIFAR-10 with all 7 methods (constant, cwd_hard, swd, cosine_schedule, half_lambda, no_wd, random_mask), 3 seeds each. SGD, lr=0.1, wd=5e-4, 200 epochs.

tasks.name: VGG-16-BN CIFAR-100: 7 methods × 3 seeds
tasks.description: Full VGG-16-BN runs on CIFAR-100 with all 7 methods, 3 seeds each. SGD, lr=0.1, wd=5e-4, 200 epochs.

tasks.name: PMP-WD + Hill variants on CIFAR-10: 3 methods × 3 seeds
tasks.description: Run pmp_wd, hill_n2, hill_n4 on ResNet-20/CIFAR-10 with 3 seeds. SGD, lr=0.1, wd=5e-4, 200 epochs.

visualizations.description: Hill function response: accuracy vs cooperativity n

tasks.name: PMP-WD + Hill variants on CIFAR-100: 3 methods × 3 seeds
tasks.description: Run pmp_wd, hill_n2, hill_n4 on ResNet-20/CIFAR-100 with 3 seeds. SGD, lr=0.1, wd=5e-4, 200 epochs.

tasks.name: Non-BN ResNet-20 ablation: constant + cwd_hard + pmp_wd × 3 seeds
tasks.description: ResNet-20 without BN on CIFAR-10. Tests H5 (AIS architecture dependence). SGD, lr=0.01, wd=5e-4, 200 epochs, 3 seeds. Key prediction: AIS > 0.5 without BN.

tasks.name: Steady-state formula validation (H1)
tasks.description: Run constant, cwd_hard, cosine_schedule on ResNet-20/CIFAR-10 with detailed per-layer per-epoch logging of ||g||, ||w||, cos(theta). Single seed (42). Compute predicted r* vs observed ||w|| for each layer.

visualizations.description: Predicted vs observed steady-state weight norm

tasks.name: ImageNet ResNet-50: constant WD (3 seeds)
tasks.description: Baseline for ImageNet. ResNet-50, SGD, lr=0.1, wd=1e-4, batch_size=256, 90 epochs, cosine LR with 5-epoch warmup. Note: ~5 hours per run. Project constraints explicitly allow longer runs for ImageNet.

tasks.name: ImageNet ResNet-50: dynamic WD methods (cwd, swd, cosine, pmp × 3 seeds)
tasks.description: Run 4 dynamic WD methods on ImageNet/ResNet-50 with 3 seeds each (12 runs total). Same setup as imagenet_constant. Critical test of whether dynamic WD helps at ImageNet scale (potentially higher AIS).

tasks.name: Statistical analysis: paired t-tests, TOST equivalence, Bonferroni
tasks.description: For all method pairs across all architectures/datasets: (1) paired t-tests with Bonferroni correction, (2) TOST equivalence tests at ±0.5%, (3) effect sizes (Cohen's d). Generate summary tables.

tasks.name: CSI vs accuracy correlation analysis
tasks.description: Compute Spearman rank correlation between CSI and accuracy across all methods and architectures. Test whether CSI is a reliable predictor of WD method quality.

visualizations.description: CSI vs accuracy scatter (all methods, all archs)

tasks.name: Generate all paper figures
tasks.description: Create publication-quality figures: (1) method comparison tables, (2) AIS trajectories, (3) CSI scatter, (4) steady-state validation, (5) weight norm curves, (6) Hill response, (7) ImageNet bar chart, (8) BEM equivalence.
